# truenas_cloudsync_credential (Data Source)

Looks up a cloud sync credential on TrueNAS SCALE by numeric ID or name. Secret-bearing provider attributes (access keys, etc.) are not exposed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_cloudsync_credential" "by_name" {
  name = "example-s3"
}

output "example_s3_id" {
  value = data.truenas_cloudsync_credential.by_name.id
}

output "example_s3_provider_type" {
  value = data.truenas_cloudsync_credential.by_name.provider_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The numeric cloud sync credential ID. Either `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) The cloud sync credential name. Either `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `provider_type` (String) The cloud provider type (e.g. S3, B2, AZUREBLOB).
